capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Is there a compliance management service defined in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a compliance management service is defined in the enterprise
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management service defined in the enterprise

questions.prompt: Is the compliance management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the compliance management service is reviewed quarterly for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use compliance management software to monitor compliance enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate use of compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring

questions.prompt: Is compliance tracked across the enterprise and subsidiaries, or is it restricted to a specific scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate scope of compliance tracking across enterprise and subsidiaries
questions.evaluation_focus: Scope across enterprise and subsidiaries

questions.prompt: Is automated compliance scanning deployed for all assets across all locations?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated compliance scanning coverage
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated compliance scanning across all assets and locations

questions.prompt: Is the compliance management software configuration reviewed at least quarterly to align with business requirements?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly software configuration review
questions.evaluation_focus: Software configuration reviewed at least quarterly to align with business

questions.prompt: Are scan results integrated with remediation software and decision points for attribute-based compliance enforcement?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration of scan results with remediation and decision points
questions.evaluation_focus: Scan results integrated with remediation and decision points

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an established, documented compliance management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate established documented compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Established documented compliance management process

questions.prompt: Is the compliance management process implemented enterprise-wide, or within a defined scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide vs scoped implementation of compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Process implemented enterprise-wide or scoped

questions.prompt: Is automation incorporated into the compliance management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate automation incorporated into the compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation incorporated into the process

questions.prompt: Is the compliance management process reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of the compliance management process
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly process review

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise officially documented all relevant standards and regulations requiring alignment?
questions.intent: Evaluate official documentation of relevant standards and regulations
questions.evaluation_focus: Official documentation of relevant standards and regulations

questions.prompt: Where DORA or financial-sector ICT rules apply, are compliance obligations mapped and tracked?
questions.intent: Evaluate DORA and financial-sector ICT compliance mapping
questions.evaluation_focus: DORA and financial-sector ICT compliance obligations mapped where applicable

questions.prompt: Are EU AI Act and AI system compliance obligations mapped for systems deployed or procured by the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate EU AI Act compliance obligation mapping
questions.evaluation_focus: EU AI Act and AI system compliance obligations mapped where applicable

questions.prompt: Are relevant compliance requirements reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of compliance requirements
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly review of compliance requirements

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise officially designed and documented compliance KPIs and KRIs?
questions.intent: Evaluate official design and documentation of compliance metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Officially designed and documented compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Do compliance metrics track control coverage and scan pass rates across the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate control coverage and scan pass rate metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Control coverage and scan pass rate metrics

questions.prompt: Is mean time to remediate compliance findings measured and reported?
questions.intent: Evaluate mean time to remediate compliance findings
questions.evaluation_focus: Mean time to remediate compliance findings

questions.prompt: Are compliance metrics reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of compliance metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly review of compliance metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have compliance management teams that manage the overall compliance management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate compliance management teams managing the overall service
questions.evaluation_focus: Compliance management teams manage the overall service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise employ policy and compliance specialists as part of the compliance teams?
questions.intent: Evaluate policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams
questions.evaluation_focus: Policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal, documented endpoint compliance (posture) policy?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented endpoint compliance policy
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal documented endpoint compliance policy

questions.prompt: Does the endpoint compliance policy apply to all devices across all locations, or to a defined scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate scope of endpoint compliance policy across devices and locations
questions.evaluation_focus: Policy scope across devices and locations

questions.prompt: Is the endpoint compliance policy reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of endpoint compliance policy
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly endpoint compliance policy review

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for hardening applications in line with compliance, including development and deployment phases with automated patching where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate application hardening process across SDLC with automation
questions.evaluation_focus: Application hardening process and coverage across SDLC

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise harden endpoint and device assets in line with compliance metrics and the compliance management process, with automated patching where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance
questions.evaluation_focus: Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for network asset hardening with automated patching where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate network asset hardening process and automation
questions.evaluation_focus: Network asset hardening process and automation

questions.prompt: Are application, device, and network hardening processes reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of hardening processes
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly review of hardening processes

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Is transport of compliance changes made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic compliance changes captured and transferred to the SOC in near-real time?
questions.intent: Evaluate capture and transfer of dynamic compliance changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic compliance changes captured and transferred to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are anomalous compliance drift events or bulk exemption grants detected and alerted to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate anomalous compliance drift and bulk exemption detection
questions.evaluation_focus: Anomalous compliance drift or bulk exemption detection

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise maintain an inventory of AI systems with risk classification for compliance purposes?
questions.intent: Evaluate AI system inventory and risk classification for compliance
questions.evaluation_focus: AI system inventory and risk classification for compliance

questions.prompt: Are EU AI Act conformity and documentation obligations tracked for in-scope AI systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate EU AI Act conformity obligation tracking
questions.evaluation_focus: EU AI Act conformity and documentation obligations tracked

questions.prompt: Is compliance posture monitored for AI vendors and third-party models integrated into enterprise workflows?
questions.intent: Evaluate AI vendor and third-party model compliance monitoring
questions.evaluation_focus: AI vendor and third-party model compliance monitoring
